args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

articles = locals()['var_function-call-12832829964130599928']

business_keywords = ['business', 'economy', 'market', 'stocks', 'financial', 'trade', 'company', 'corporate', 'invest', 'entrepreneur', 'industry', 'economic', 'finance', 'deal', 'bank', 'ceo', 'profit', 'revenue', 'startup']

def is_business_article(title, description):
    text = (title + ' ' + description).lower()
    return any(keyword in text for keyword in business_keywords)

business_articles_ids = [str(article['article_id']) for article in articles if is_business_article(article['title'], article['description'])]

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(business_articles_ids))

var_function-call-8195828160166652868.title: Wall St. Bears Claw Back Into the Black (Reuters)
var_function-call-8195828160166652868.description: Reuters - Short-sellers, Wall Street's dwindling\band of ultra-cynics, are seeing green again.

var_function-call-8195828160166652868.title: Carlyle Looks Toward Commercial Aerospace (Reuters)
var_function-call-8195828160166652868.description: Reuters - Private investment firm Carlyle Group,\which has a reputation for making well-timed and occasionally\controversial plays in the defense industry, has quietly placed\its bets on another part of the market.

var_function-call-8195828160166652868.title: Oil and Economy Cloud Stocks' Outlook (Reuters)
var_function-call-8195828160166652868.description: Reuters - Soaring crude prices plus worries\about the economy and the outlook for earnings are expected to\hang over the stock market next week during the depth of the\summer doldrums.

var_function-call-8195828160166652868.title: Iraq Halts Oil Exports from Main Southern Pipeline (Reuters)
var_function-call-8195828160166652868.description: Reuters - Authorities have halted oil export\flows from the main pipeline in southern Iraq after\intelligence showed a rebel militia could strike\infrastructure, an oil official said on Saturday.

var_function-call-8195828160166652868.title: Oil prices soar to all-time record, posing new menace to US economy (AFP)
var_function-call-8195828160166652868.description: AFP - Tearaway world oil prices, toppling records and straining wallets, present a new economic menace barely three months before the US presidential elections.

val_args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

articles = locals()['var_function-call-12832829964130599928']

business_keywords = ['business', 'economy', 'market', 'stocks', 'financial', 'trade', 'company', 'corporate', 'invest', 'entrepreneur', 'industry', 'economic', 'finance', 'deal', 'bank', 'ceo', 'profit', 'revenue', 'startup']

def is_business_article(title, description):
    text = (title + ' ' + description).lower()
    return any(keyword in text for keyword in business_keywords)

business_articles_ids = [str(article['article_id']) for article in articles if is_business_article(article['title'], article['description'])]

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(business_articles_ids))

args.query: SELECT article_id, region, publication_date FROM article_metadata WHERE article_id IN ('1', '2', '4') AND region = 'Europe' AND SUBSTR(publication_date, 1, 4) BETWEEN '2010' AND '2020';
